entries.name: Twisted Vase
entries.description: Stacked rotated rings forming a hex-faceted twisted profile.

entries.name: Christmas Tree
entries.description: Low-poly tiered tree with a stellated octahedron star on top.

entries.name: Chess Rook
entries.description: Hollow chess rook with crenellations cut from the parapet.

entries.name: OpenSCAD: Twisted
entries.description: Twisted star column via OpenSCAD's linear_extrude.

entries.name: Retro Rocket
entries.description: Classic retro rocket with ogive nose cone, fins, porthole window, and thrust nozzle.

entries.name: Steampunk Rocket
entries.description: Tall multi-stage rocket with an ogive nose cone and revolved fuselage.

entries.name: Snowman
entries.description: Three-sphere snowman with carrot nose, top hat, scarf, and branchy arms across five painted iterations.
